question_text: Examine the flowchart shown below depicting the three tiers of government in India. Which subjects fall under the legislative authority of the middle tier?

answer_key.explanation: Subjects of regional importance such as police and public health appear in the State List, handled by the state government tier.
answer_key.related_concept: Subjects in the State List under Indian federalism

visual.caption: Tiers of government in India.
visual.altText: Top-down flowchart with a single root node branching into two child nodes, which in turn each branch into local-government leaves.
